roa.docketEntryComment: DEFT ADD TO CAL FOR RETURN OF PROPERTYORDER & PROPOSED ORDER - FILED

/CAL: DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR RETURN OF PROPERTY/X: GOOD CAUSE APPEARING, IT IS HEREBY ORDERED THAT: THE PROPERTY SEIZED ONFEBRUARY 7, 2019 AND AUGUST7, 2019 BY SGT, NOGUICHI, STAR # 1550 AND SGT, YICK, STAR # 1032, FROM BENJAMIN JAMES WATERS, TO WIT: (1)PERSONAL PHOTOGRAPHS, BOOKS, CLOTHING, GARDENING TOOLS, AND BUSINESS CHECKS, BE RETURNED TO BENJAMIN JAMES WATERS,/X:ORDER OF THE COURT IS SIGNED AND FILED IN COURT/

/CAL:TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING & FILING & ARRAIGNMENT ON CONSOLIDATED COMPLAINT/X:CONSOLDATED CASES 19000640 AND 19002129 AND 19002130/X:CONSOLIDATED FELONY COMPLAINT FILED/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/STWPX/X:ACM STATUS REMAINS/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/X:EST 1DAY/
/CAL:PTC & RULING ON MOT TO CONSOLIDATE (OPEN MISD)/X:MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE WITH #19002129 & 19002130 IS GRANTED,/TE:1 DAY/DOP/CONTD:TO SET PRELIM; FILING & AN ON CONSOLIDATED COMPLAINT/

/CAL:PTC & DA MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE/ARG&SUB/MO DENIED/X:WITHOUT PREJUDICE/BE/OR/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL  MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH AGPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTHON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVEBY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/WEAP/WS/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,//DOP/CONTD:PTC (OPEN MISD)/

/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/GTWM/SA1:MARC VIRGA/SA1:MICHAEL WESTERFIELD/SAORD4:10 YARDS/SAORD/CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/DOPU:MILLS WAIVER/
/CAL:DISPOSIITION/X:THIS IS A CONSOLIDATED COMPLAINT/MO PC 1385:PURSUANTTO NEGOTIATED DISPO/
/CAL:TO SET/X:THE PARTIES ARE NOT YET READY TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING,/CONTD:DISPOSITION IN D9/DOP/
/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/X:DEFENSE COUNSEL'S ORAL MOTION FOR CONTINUANCE IS GRANTED,/CONTD:CASE SETTING/DOP/
